case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. MARITZA MARRERO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARRERO, MARITZA $1,261.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,336.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
